title: HCI Live-Cluster Data Reduction Efficiency Drift and Savings-at-Risk Tracking
exclusions: HPE SimpliVity backup-centric telemetry and RPO policy surfaces belong to UC-19.2.20. Erasure coding overhead and rebuild amplification studies stay in UC-19.2.28. Pure SAN arrays without vSAN, Nutanix, HyperFlex, or Azure Stack HCI stacks are out of scope. Hyperscale object stores with erasure unrelated to these HCI platforms are excluded. Kubernetes-only persistent storage that never lands on the named sourcetimes should not be force-fit into this multisearch.
evidence: Saved search ss_uc_19_2_24_hci_live_efficiency_drift_v1 with thirty-minute cadence, version-controlled lookups/hci_efficiency_baseline.csv, exported CSV of the final table to a restricted evidence index for fourteen months, ticket screenshots of vendor efficiency consoles keyed by cluster_id and container_id.

controlTest.positiveScenario: In a lab index hci, ingest seven consecutive days of nutanix:container:efficiency events where combined multipliers fall from 2.4 to 1.7 for one container_id with stable physical_used_gb near 4096 GB while hci_efficiency_baseline supplies target_max_drift_pct 15 and blank efficiency_baseline so streamstats builds a mean; the saved search should classify severity at high or critical when drift exceeds thresholds and dedupe_savings_lost_gb_24h crosses 1024 on the critical ladder.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Populate hci_efficiency_baseline change_freeze_until forty-eight hours into the future for the same cluster_id container_id vendor triple while injecting synthetic drift; severity should demote to informational for that triple while numeric efficiency_drift_pct and combined_efficiency_ratio columns stay nonzero, proving freeze handling without suppressing evidence, and restore baseline rows to clear the freeze.

dataSources: PRIMARY multisearch normalization for live production data-reduction (not backup jobs): (1) VMware vSAN — Splunk Add-on for VMware vSphere Forwarder (Splunkbase 5380) plus scheduled PowerCLI export mapping Get-VsanClusterConfiguration spaceEfficiencyConfig, Get-VsanRuntimeInfo dedupeRatio and compressionRatio, and Get-Datastore capacity into sourcetypes vmware:vsan:efficiency and vmware:vsan:cluster_capacity with fields for logical versus physical consumption per object or cluster scope you flatten. (2) Nutanix — Splunk_TA_nutanix (Splunkbase 5076) sourcetype nutanix:container alongside custom HEC polls to Prism Element /PrismGateway/services/rest/v2.0/storage_containers and /v2.0/cluster/storage_efficiency publishing compression_ratio, dedup_ratio, clone_ratio, erasure_code_ratio into sourcetypes nutanix:container:efficiency and nutanix:cluster:efficiency. (3) Cisco HyperFlex — read-only HX Connect REST /rest/clusters/{cid}/efficiency and /rest/clusters/{cid}/data_reduction_stats into sourcetypes hyperflex:cluster:efficiency and hyperflex:cluster:data_reduction. (4) Azure Stack HCI / Storage Spaces Direct — scheduled PowerShell export of Get-DedupStatus and Get-DedupVolume plus pool-level compression signals from Get-StoragePool combined with Get-StorageReliabilityCounter into sourcetypes azure_stack_hci:refs:dedup and azure_stack_hci:s2d:compression. Governance lookup hci_efficiency_baseline.csv published as hci_efficiency_baseline via transforms.conf supplies owner_team, target_max_drift_pct, target_min_combined_ratio, optional static efficiency_baseline, workload class, and change_freeze_until.
app: Splunk Add-on for VMware vSphere Forwarder (Splunkbase 5380) with PowerCLI efficiency export; Splunk_TA_nutanix (Splunkbase 5076) with Prism REST HEC pollers; Cisco HyperFlex HX Connect REST collector (custom HEC); Azure Stack HCI PowerShell export with HEC; Splunk wrapper app holding hci_efficiency_baseline lookup
spl:
`comment("UC-19.2.24 HCI live-cluster data reduction efficiency drift across vSAN, Nutanix, HyperFlex, Azure Stack HCI. Tunables: hci_efficiency_baseline.csv (target_min_combined_ratio default 1.5, target_max_drift_pct default 15, optional efficiency_baseline per container). Owner: owner_team. Freeze: change_freeze_until forces informational severity when active. Rename index= to match deployment; prefers index hci with multisearch arms ORed to vmware, nutanix, cisco, microsoft. Rolling fallback baseline uses streamstats time_window=30d after daily bin. daily bucket adds _time to BY for streamstats.")`
| multisearch
    [ search (index=hci OR index=vmware) (sourcetype="vmware:vsan:efficiency" OR sourcetype="vmware:vsan:cluster_capacity") earliest=-30d@d latest=@h
    | eval cluster_id=toString(coalesce(cluster_id, cluster_name, clusterName, clusterUuid, "UNKNOWN_CLUSTER"))
    | eval container_id=toString(coalesce(container_id, datastore_id, datastore_uuid, ds_id, volume_id, vsan_datastore, object_id, datastore_name, "VSAN_SCOPE"))
    | eval dr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(dedupe_ratio, dedupeRatio, DedupeRatio, spaceEfficiencyDedupeRatio, "1")), 10)
    | eval cr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(compression_ratio, compressionRatio, CompressionRatio, spaceEfficiencyCompressionRatio, "1")), 10)
    | eval dedupe_ratio=if((dr>45), round((dr/100.0), 6), if((dr>0), dr, 1.0))
    | eval compression_ratio=if((cr>45), round((cr/100.0), 6), if((cr>0), cr, 1.0))
    | eval clone_ratio=1.0
    | eval phyb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(physical_used_bytes, consumed_bytes, ConsumedStorageB, consumedStorageB, "0")), 10)
    | eval logb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(logical_used_bytes, logical_provisioned_bytes, logical_bytes, ProvisionedStorageB, "0")), 10)
    | eval physical_used_gb=if((phyb>1048576), round((phyb/1073741824.0), 4), tonumber(tostring(coalesce(physical_used_gb, physical_used_GiB, used_gb, consumed_gb, "0")), 10))
    | eval logical_used_gb=if((logb>1048576), round((logb/1073741824.0), 4), tonumber(tostring(coalesce(logical_used_gb, logical_used_GiB, logical_gb, provisioned_gb, "0")), 10))
    | eval vendor="vsan"
    | bin _time span=1d aligntime=@d
    | stats latest(dedupe_ratio) AS dedupe_ratio latest(compression_ratio) AS compression_ratio latest(clone_ratio) AS clone_ratio latest(physical_used_gb) AS physical_used_gb latest(logical_used_gb) AS logical_used_gb BY cluster_id container_id vendor _time ]
    [
    search (index=hci OR index=nutanix) (sourcetype="nutanix:container" OR sourcetype="nutanix:container:efficiency" OR sourcetype="nutanix:cluster:efficiency") earliest=-30d@d latest=@h
    | eval cluster_id=toString(coalesce(cluster_name, clusterName, cluster_id, cluster_uuid, clusterUuid, "UNKNOWN_CLUSTER"))
    | eval container_id=toString(coalesce(container_id, container_uuid, containerUuid, storage_container_name, name, container_name, "NTNX_CONTAINER"))
    | eval dr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(dedup_ratio, dedupe_ratio, dedupeRatio, "1")), 10)
    | eval cr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(compression_ratio, compressionRatio, "1")), 10)
    | eval clr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(clone_ratio, cloneRatio, "1")), 10)
    | eval dedupe_ratio=if((dr>45), round((dr/100.0), 6), if((dr>0), dr, 1.0))
    | eval compression_ratio=if((cr>45), round((cr/100.0), 6), if((cr>0), cr, 1.0))
    | eval clone_ratio=if((clr>45), round((clr/100.0), 6), if((clr>0), clr, 1.0))
    | eval phyb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(physical_usage_bytes, used_physical_bytes, data_reduction_saved_bytes, "0")), 10)
    | eval logb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(logical_usage_bytes, user_bytes, advertised_capacity_bytes, "0")), 10)
    | eval physical_used_gb=if((phyb>1048576), round((phyb/1073741824.0), 4), tonumber(tostring(coalesce(physical_used_gb, "0")), 10))
    | eval logical_used_gb=if((logb>1048576), round((logb/1073741824.0), 4), tonumber(tostring(coalesce(logical_used_gb, "0")), 10))
    | eval vendor="nutanix"
    | bin _time span=1d aligntime=@d
    | stats latest(dedupe_ratio) AS dedupe_ratio latest(compression_ratio) AS compression_ratio latest(clone_ratio) AS clone_ratio latest(physical_used_gb) AS physical_used_gb latest(logical_used_gb) AS logical_used_gb BY cluster_id container_id vendor _time ]
    [
    search (index=hci OR index=cisco) (sourcetype="hyperflex:cluster:efficiency" OR sourcetype="hyperflex:cluster:data_reduction") earliest=-30d@d latest=@h
    | eval cluster_id=toString(coalesce(cluster_id, clusterId, cluster_name, clusterName, "UNKNOWN_CLUSTER"))
    | eval container_id=toString(coalesce(container_id, dataStoreName, volume_name, scope, "HF_CLUSTER"))
    | eval dr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(dedupe_ratio, dedupeRatio, dedup_ratio, data_reduction_dedup_ratio, "1")), 10)
    | eval cr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(compression_ratio, compressionRatio, data_reduction_compression_ratio, "1")), 10)
    | eval dedupe_ratio=if((dr>45), round((dr/100.0), 6), if((dr>0), dr, 1.0))
    | eval compression_ratio=if((cr>45), round((cr/100.0), 6), if((cr>0), cr, 1.0))
    | eval clone_ratio=1.0
    | eval physical_used_gb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(physical_used_gb, physicalUsedGiB, used_physical_gb, "0")), 10)
    | eval logical_used_gb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(logical_used_gb, logicalUsedGiB, used_logical_gb, "0")), 10)
    | eval vendor="hyperflex"
    | bin _time span=1d aligntime=@d
    | stats latest(dedupe_ratio) AS dedupe_ratio latest(compression_ratio) AS compression_ratio latest(clone_ratio) AS clone_ratio latest(physical_used_gb) AS physical_used_gb latest(logical_used_gb) AS logical_used_gb BY cluster_id container_id vendor _time ]
    [
    search (index=hci OR index=microsoft) (sourcetype="azure_stack_hci:refs:dedup" OR sourcetype="azure_stack_hci:s2d:compression") earliest=-30d@d latest=@h
    | eval cluster_id=toString(coalesce(cluster_name, clusterName, cluster_id, failover_cluster_name, "UNKNOWN_CLUSTER"))
    | eval container_id=toString(coalesce(container_id, volume_id, volume_guid, VolumeId, job_volume, "S2D_VOLUME"))
    | eval dr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(dedupe_ratio, dedupeRatio, DedupSavedPercent, dedup_savings_ratio, "1")), 10)
    | eval cr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(compression_ratio, compressionRatio, savingsRateCompression, "1")), 10)
    | eval dedupe_ratio=if(match(tostring(dr), "^.*\..*$") AND (dr<=5) AND (dr>0), dr, if((dr>45), round((dr/100.0), 6), if((dr>0) AND (dr<=45), round(((100.0+dr)/100.0), 6), 1.0)))
    | eval compression_ratio=if((cr>45), round((cr/100.0), 6), if((cr>0), cr, 1.0))
    | eval clone_ratio=1.0
    | eval physical_used_gb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(physical_used_gb, used_physical_GB, dedup_used_size_gb, "0")), 10)
    | eval logical_used_gb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(logical_used_gb, saved_space_gb, logical_size_gb, "0")), 10)
    | eval vendor="azure_stack_hci"
    | bin _time span=1d aligntime=@d
    | stats latest(dedupe_ratio) AS dedupe_ratio latest(compression_ratio) AS compression_ratio latest(clone_ratio) AS clone_ratio latest(physical_used_gb) AS physical_used_gb latest(logical_used_gb) AS logical_used_gb BY cluster_id container_id vendor _time ]
| where (cluster_id!="UNKNOWN_CLUSTER")
| eval vendor=lower(vendor)
| fillnull value=1.0 dedupe_ratio compression_ratio
| eval clone_ratio=coalesce(clone_ratio, 1.0)
| eval dedupe_ratio=if((dedupe_ratio<=0), 1.0, dedupe_ratio)
| eval compression_ratio=if((compression_ratio<=0), 1.0, compression_ratio)
| eval combined_efficiency_ratio=round((dedupe_ratio * compression_ratio * clone_ratio), 6)
| sort 0 + cluster_id container_id vendor _time
| streamstats time_window=30d current=t window=32 global=f avg(combined_efficiency_ratio) AS eff_stream_mean BY cluster_id container_id vendor
| eventstats latest(physical_used_gb) AS cluster_phys_hint latest(logical_used_gb) AS cluster_log_hint BY cluster_id vendor
| eval physical_used_gb=if((physical_used_gb<=0), cluster_phys_hint, physical_used_gb)
| eval logical_used_gb=if((logical_used_gb<=0), cluster_log_hint, logical_used_gb)
| join type=left max=0 cluster_id container_id vendor
    [| inputlookup hci_efficiency_baseline
     | eval cluster_id=toString(cluster_id)
     | eval container_id=toString(coalesce(container_id, volume_id, volumeId, ""))
     | eval vendor=lower(toString(vendor))
     | eval owner_team=toString(coalesce(owner_team, ownerTeam, ""))
     | eval target_min_combined_ratio=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(target_min_combined_ratio, targetMinCombinedRatio, "1.5")), 10)
     | eval target_max_drift_pct=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(target_max_drift_pct, targetMaxDriftPct, "15")), 10)
     | eval efficiency_baseline_csv=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(efficiency_baseline, efficiencyBaseline, "")), 10)
     | eval change_freeze_until=toString(coalesce(change_freeze_until, changeFreezeUntil, ""))
     | fields cluster_id container_id vendor owner_team target_min_combined_ratio target_max_drift_pct efficiency_baseline_csv change_freeze_until ]
| eval eff_lookup=if((isnotnull(efficiency_baseline_csv)) AND (efficiency_baseline_csv>0), efficiency_baseline_csv, null)
| eval efficiency_baseline=coalesce(eff_lookup, eff_stream_mean, combined_efficiency_ratio)
| eval efficiency_drift_pct=if((efficiency_baseline>0), round((((efficiency_baseline - combined_efficiency_ratio) / efficiency_baseline) * 100.0), 4), 0)
| eval physical_used_gb=if((physical_used_gb<=0) AND (logical_used_gb>0), logical_used_gb, physical_used_gb)
| eval dedupe_savings_lost_gb_24h=round(((efficiency_drift_pct / 100.0) * physical_used_gb), 4)
| sort 0 + cluster_id container_id vendor _time
| streamstats time_window=7d current=t window=8 global=f sum(dedupe_savings_lost_gb_24h) AS efficiency_capacity_at_risk_gb BY cluster_id container_id vendor
| eval warn_floor=round((target_max_drift_pct - 7.0), 4)
| eval ft=coalesce(strptime(change_freeze_until, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z"), strptime(change_freeze_until, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"), strptime(change_freeze_until, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"), strptime(change_freeze_until, "%Y-%m-%d"))
| eval freeze_active=if((len(toString(change_freeze_until))>4) AND (isnotnull(ft)) AND (now() < ft), 1, 0)
| eval below_min=if((isnotnull(target_min_combined_ratio)) AND (target_min_combined_ratio>0) AND (combined_efficiency_ratio < target_min_combined_ratio), 1, 0)
| eval sev0=case((((efficiency_drift_pct >= 25) AND (dedupe_savings_lost_gb_24h >= 1024))), "critical", ((efficiency_drift_pct >= target_max_drift_pct)), "high", ((efficiency_drift_pct >= warn_floor)), "warning", ((below_min=1)), "warning", 1=1, "info")
| eval severity=if((freeze_active=1), "info", sev0)
| dedup cluster_id container_id vendor sortby - _time
| table vendor cluster_id container_id combined_efficiency_ratio efficiency_baseline efficiency_drift_pct dedupe_ratio compression_ratio clone_ratio physical_used_gb dedupe_savings_lost_gb_24h efficiency_capacity_at_risk_gb severity owner_team change_freeze_until
description: Tracks live hyperconverged production data-reduction efficiency—deduplication, compression, clone savings where exposed, and container-level ratios normalized across VMware vSAN, Nutanix, Cisco HyperFlex, and Azure Stack HCI—then measures drift versus a governance baseline per storage scope. This is intentionally not HPE SimpliVity backup-job deduplication (UC-19.2.20), not erasure coding scheme overhead and rebuild amplification (UC-19.2.28), and not raw shared-pool growth without interpreting the reduction stack (UC-19.2.2). The outcome is an auditable ratio-plus-GB story that quantifies how much logical capacity headroom dissolves when ratios soften.
value: Silent ratio erosion buys capacity debt: planners still see free terabytes on a pool chart while effective headroom shrinks because clones, compressible blocks, or duplicate fragments stop packing as tightly after workload shifts, firmware changes, or policy drift. Normalizing vendors into one drift and savings-at-risk signal lets finance and platform teams intervene—rebalance tenants, retune policies, or stage expansion—before uncorrected growth trips hard thresholds, without treating backup efficiency or erasure-code math as if they were the same risk.
implementation: Stand up the four ingestion paths (subset acceptable if the estate is single-vendor), publish hci_efficiency_baseline with cluster_id, container_id or volume_id, vendor, owner_team, targets, optional static efficiency_baseline, and change_freeze_until, install the comment macro, schedule the multisearch over at least thirty days of retention with daily buckets intact for streamstats, route critical savings rows to capacity bridge queues, and pair the dashboard with UC-19.2.2 pool context so warnings map to purchase timing.
visualization: Time series of combined_efficiency_ratio with reference band from efficiency_baseline, single value of efficiency_capacity_at_risk_gb for the worst container, trellised vendor panels, sortable table matching the alert projection, optional overlay of logical_used_gb versus physical_used_gb for audit.
knownFalsePositives: Large ingest of inherently incompressible media lowers multipliers without hardware faults. Firmware background scans or dedupe restripe jobs temporarily change reported ratios until resilver completes. Seasonal VDI refresh cycles shift clone_ratio on Nutanix while other vendors stay flat, resembling drift when baselines were winter-weighted. Prism or HX REST partial outages can emit one stale sample that mimics softness until the next healthy poll. Planned migrations that deliberately flatten clones move combined_efficiency_ratio in ways that match real capacity need, not telemetry breakage.

premiumApps.name: Splunk ITSI
premiumApps.note: optional — service KPIs on combined_efficiency_ratio and efficiency_drift_pct with threshold templates per cluster

detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites

This use case occupies the live-cluster data-reduction axis for hyperconverged estates. It contrasts directly with UC-19.2.20, which is HPE SimpliVity backup pass-fail and OmniStack backup-efficiency telemetry that answers whether recovery points and policy assignments are healthy. UC-19.2.28 is about erasure coding scheme correctness and rebuild amplification overhead, not the day-to-day multiplication of dedupe and compression on active data. UC-19.2.2 remains the raw pool capacity growth anchor; ratios here explain why usable logical headroom diverges from naive byte counts. Multisearch keeps each vendor normalization explicit so a Prism field rename does not silently null-out vSAN math in the same pipeline. Indexes: consolidate on index hci or keep vmware, nutanix, cisco, microsoft splits and mirror the OR clauses in each arm exactly as deployed. Retention must cover thirty days at minimum for streamstats fallback baselines; shorter retention forces reliance on hci_efficiency_baseline static columns alone. Splunk role operators need srchIndexesAllowed covering every index named in the arms. hci efficiency governance file hci_efficiency_baseline.csv lives under lookups with transforms.conf stanza hci_efficiency_baseline, min_matches zero, case sensitivity aligned to your CMDB keys. Columns: cluster_id, container_id (or volume_id synonym column volume_id if you split identifiers), vendor in lowercase slugs vsan, nutanix, hyperflex, azure_stack_hci, owner_team, target_min_combined_ratio defaulting internally to 1.5 inside the join when blank, target_max_drift_pct defaulting to 15 when blank, expected_workload_class values vsi, vdi, db, file, devtest for human sorting outside the SPL, optional efficiency_baseline numeric that overrides streamstats when populated, change_freeze_until ISO-8601 or empty for pager demotion. Network posture: Prism HTTPS 9440 outbound from the collector, HX Connect HTTPS from a dedicated automation host, vCenter reach for PowerCLI exports with least privilege, Azure Stack HCI WinRM or local scheduled task on a jump host posting HEC. Licensing: no premium app is mandatory; ITSI is optional for KPI overlays. Hardware heterogeneity: heterogeneous CPU or disk generations within one cluster id still produce valid ratios when feeds carry scope-correct counters.

Step 1 — Configure data collection

Create a wrapper app TA_hci_live_efficiency with props.conf that forces SHOULD_LINEMERGE=false, raises TRUNCATE for large JSON, enables KV_MODE=json for HEC payloads, and stamps TIME_PREFIX to your epoch or ISO choice for each sourcetype family. VMware path: install Splunk Add-on for VMware vSphere Forwarder per architecture standards, then add a scheduled PowerCLI task on a Windows automation account that connects to vCenter, runs Get-VsanClusterConfiguration and captures spaceEfficiencyConfig intent, runs Get-VsanRuntimeInfo per cluster for dedupeRatio and compressionRatio multipliers or percentages your build emits, and runs datastore capacity pulls that output physical versus logical consumption you map into vmware:vsan:efficiency for ratio-bearing JSON and vmware:vsan:cluster_capacity for byte-level used fields when you split feeds. Post one JSON object per poll per scope to HEC with sourcetype tags exactly vmware:vsan:efficiency and vmware:vsan:cluster_capacity so coalesce chains resolve. Nutanix path: deploy Splunk_TA_nutanix collectors for nutanix:container baseline inventory metrics, then add a Python poller posting nutanix:container:efficiency and nutanix:cluster:efficiency from /PrismGateway/services/rest/v2.0/storage_containers and /v2.0/cluster/storage_efficiency including compression_ratio, dedup_ratio, clone_ratio, erasure_code_ratio when returned, plus container identifiers stable across days. HyperFlex path: schedule read-only HX Connect sessions to GET /rest/clusters/{cid}/efficiency and /rest/clusters/{cid}/data_reduction_stats, flatten dedupe and compression multipliers with documented unit tests, and emit hyperflex:cluster:efficiency and hyperflex:cluster:data_reduction. Azure Stack HCI path: scheduled PowerShell on a privileged maintenance host exporting Get-DedupStatus and Get-DedupVolume with volume GUID keys, pairing pool compression indicators from Get-StoragePool via Get-StorageReliabilityCounter into azure_stack_hci:s2d:compression while dedup counters land in azure_stack_hci:refs:dedup. Always include cluster_id and container_id in every event even if HyperFlex scope is cluster-aggregated so joins succeed with HF_CLUSTER placeholder rows. inputs.conf should separate HEC tokens per security domain if required. Document divisor policy for bytes to gibibytes consistently as 1073741824. Poll daily or more frequently; the SPL bins to one day for mathematical stability while preserving stream history.

Step 2 — Create the search and alert

Save the SPL below as ss_uc_19_2_24_hci_live_efficiency_drift_v1 with cron schedule star-slash-thirty over minutes, dispatch earliest minus two hours on the saved search while the interior arms remain earliest=-30d@d latest=@h so drift math sees history. Alert when severity is critical or high, throttle on cluster_id container_id vendor for forty-five minutes, escalate when efficiency_capacity_at_risk_gb crosses procurement thresholds you maintain in a side lookup. Route owner_team from hci_efficiency_baseline to ticketing assignment groups. Map freeze windows by populating change_freeze_until during firmware push weeks; severity drops to informational while freeze_active without deleting rows so evidence still exists.

```spl
`comment("UC-19.2.24 HCI live-cluster data reduction efficiency drift across vSAN, Nutanix, HyperFlex, Azure Stack HCI. Tunables: hci_efficiency_baseline.csv (target_min_combined_ratio default 1.5, target_max_drift_pct default 15, optional efficiency_baseline per container). Owner: owner_team. Freeze: change_freeze_until forces informational severity when active. Rename index= to match deployment; prefers index hci with multisearch arms ORed to vmware, nutanix, cisco, microsoft. Rolling fallback baseline uses streamstats time_window=30d after daily bin. daily bucket adds _time to BY for streamstats.")`
| multisearch
    [ search (index=hci OR index=vmware) (sourcetype="vmware:vsan:efficiency" OR sourcetype="vmware:vsan:cluster_capacity") earliest=-30d@d latest=@h
    | eval cluster_id=toString(coalesce(cluster_id, cluster_name, clusterName, clusterUuid, "UNKNOWN_CLUSTER"))
    | eval container_id=toString(coalesce(container_id, datastore_id, datastore_uuid, ds_id, volume_id, vsan_datastore, object_id, datastore_name, "VSAN_SCOPE"))
    | eval dr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(dedupe_ratio, dedupeRatio, DedupeRatio, spaceEfficiencyDedupeRatio, "1")), 10)
    | eval cr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(compression_ratio, compressionRatio, CompressionRatio, spaceEfficiencyCompressionRatio, "1")), 10)
    | eval dedupe_ratio=if((dr>45), round((dr/100.0), 6), if((dr>0), dr, 1.0))
    | eval compression_ratio=if((cr>45), round((cr/100.0), 6), if((cr>0), cr, 1.0))
    | eval clone_ratio=1.0
    | eval phyb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(physical_used_bytes, consumed_bytes, ConsumedStorageB, consumedStorageB, "0")), 10)
    | eval logb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(logical_used_bytes, logical_provisioned_bytes, logical_bytes, ProvisionedStorageB, "0")), 10)
    | eval physical_used_gb=if((phyb>1048576), round((phyb/1073741824.0), 4), tonumber(tostring(coalesce(physical_used_gb, physical_used_GiB, used_gb, consumed_gb, "0")), 10))
    | eval logical_used_gb=if((logb>1048576), round((logb/1073741824.0), 4), tonumber(tostring(coalesce(logical_used_gb, logical_used_GiB, logical_gb, provisioned_gb, "0")), 10))
    | eval vendor="vsan"
    | bin _time span=1d aligntime=@d
    | stats latest(dedupe_ratio) AS dedupe_ratio latest(compression_ratio) AS compression_ratio latest(clone_ratio) AS clone_ratio latest(physical_used_gb) AS physical_used_gb latest(logical_used_gb) AS logical_used_gb BY cluster_id container_id vendor _time ]
    [
    search (index=hci OR index=nutanix) (sourcetype="nutanix:container" OR sourcetype="nutanix:container:efficiency" OR sourcetype="nutanix:cluster:efficiency") earliest=-30d@d latest=@h
    | eval cluster_id=toString(coalesce(cluster_name, clusterName, cluster_id, cluster_uuid, clusterUuid, "UNKNOWN_CLUSTER"))
    | eval container_id=toString(coalesce(container_id, container_uuid, containerUuid, storage_container_name, name, container_name, "NTNX_CONTAINER"))
    | eval dr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(dedup_ratio, dedupe_ratio, dedupeRatio, "1")), 10)
    | eval cr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(compression_ratio, compressionRatio, "1")), 10)
    | eval clr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(clone_ratio, cloneRatio, "1")), 10)
    | eval dedupe_ratio=if((dr>45), round((dr/100.0), 6), if((dr>0), dr, 1.0))
    | eval compression_ratio=if((cr>45), round((cr/100.0), 6), if((cr>0), cr, 1.0))
    | eval clone_ratio=if((clr>45), round((clr/100.0), 6), if((clr>0), clr, 1.0))
    | eval phyb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(physical_usage_bytes, used_physical_bytes, data_reduction_saved_bytes, "0")), 10)
    | eval logb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(logical_usage_bytes, user_bytes, advertised_capacity_bytes, "0")), 10)
    | eval physical_used_gb=if((phyb>1048576), round((phyb/1073741824.0), 4), tonumber(tostring(coalesce(physical_used_gb, "0")), 10))
    | eval logical_used_gb=if((logb>1048576), round((logb/1073741824.0), 4), tonumber(tostring(coalesce(logical_used_gb, "0")), 10))
    | eval vendor="nutanix"
    | bin _time span=1d aligntime=@d
    | stats latest(dedupe_ratio) AS dedupe_ratio latest(compression_ratio) AS compression_ratio latest(clone_ratio) AS clone_ratio latest(physical_used_gb) AS physical_used_gb latest(logical_used_gb) AS logical_used_gb BY cluster_id container_id vendor _time ]
    [
    search (index=hci OR index=cisco) (sourcetype="hyperflex:cluster:efficiency" OR sourcetype="hyperflex:cluster:data_reduction") earliest=-30d@d latest=@h
    | eval cluster_id=toString(coalesce(cluster_id, clusterId, cluster_name, clusterName, "UNKNOWN_CLUSTER"))
    | eval container_id=toString(coalesce(container_id, dataStoreName, volume_name, scope, "HF_CLUSTER"))
    | eval dr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(dedupe_ratio, dedupeRatio, dedup_ratio, data_reduction_dedup_ratio, "1")), 10)
    | eval cr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(compression_ratio, compressionRatio, data_reduction_compression_ratio, "1")), 10)
    | eval dedupe_ratio=if((dr>45), round((dr/100.0), 6), if((dr>0), dr, 1.0))
    | eval compression_ratio=if((cr>45), round((cr/100.0), 6), if((cr>0), cr, 1.0))
    | eval clone_ratio=1.0
    | eval physical_used_gb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(physical_used_gb, physicalUsedGiB, used_physical_gb, "0")), 10)
    | eval logical_used_gb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(logical_used_gb, logicalUsedGiB, used_logical_gb, "0")), 10)
    | eval vendor="hyperflex"
    | bin _time span=1d aligntime=@d
    | stats latest(dedupe_ratio) AS dedupe_ratio latest(compression_ratio) AS compression_ratio latest(clone_ratio) AS clone_ratio latest(physical_used_gb) AS physical_used_gb latest(logical_used_gb) AS logical_used_gb BY cluster_id container_id vendor _time ]
    [
    search (index=hci OR index=microsoft) (sourcetype="azure_stack_hci:refs:dedup" OR sourcetype="azure_stack_hci:s2d:compression") earliest=-30d@d latest=@h
    | eval cluster_id=toString(coalesce(cluster_name, clusterName, cluster_id, failover_cluster_name, "UNKNOWN_CLUSTER"))
    | eval container_id=toString(coalesce(container_id, volume_id, volume_guid, VolumeId, job_volume, "S2D_VOLUME"))
    | eval dr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(dedupe_ratio, dedupeRatio, DedupSavedPercent, dedup_savings_ratio, "1")), 10)
    | eval cr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(compression_ratio, compressionRatio, savingsRateCompression, "1")), 10)
    | eval dedupe_ratio=if(match(tostring(dr), "^.*\..*$") AND (dr<=5) AND (dr>0), dr, if((dr>45), round((dr/100.0), 6), if((dr>0) AND (dr<=45), round(((100.0+dr)/100.0), 6), 1.0)))
    | eval compression_ratio=if((cr>45), round((cr/100.0), 6), if((cr>0), cr, 1.0))
    | eval clone_ratio=1.0
    | eval physical_used_gb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(physical_used_gb, used_physical_GB, dedup_used_size_gb, "0")), 10)
    | eval logical_used_gb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(logical_used_gb, saved_space_gb, logical_size_gb, "0")), 10)
    | eval vendor="azure_stack_hci"
    | bin _time span=1d aligntime=@d
    | stats latest(dedupe_ratio) AS dedupe_ratio latest(compression_ratio) AS compression_ratio latest(clone_ratio) AS clone_ratio latest(physical_used_gb) AS physical_used_gb latest(logical_used_gb) AS logical_used_gb BY cluster_id container_id vendor _time ]
| where (cluster_id!="UNKNOWN_CLUSTER")
| eval vendor=lower(vendor)
| fillnull value=1.0 dedupe_ratio compression_ratio
| eval clone_ratio=coalesce(clone_ratio, 1.0)
| eval dedupe_ratio=if((dedupe_ratio<=0), 1.0, dedupe_ratio)
| eval compression_ratio=if((compression_ratio<=0), 1.0, compression_ratio)
| eval combined_efficiency_ratio=round((dedupe_ratio * compression_ratio * clone_ratio), 6)
| sort 0 + cluster_id container_id vendor _time
| streamstats time_window=30d current=t window=32 global=f avg(combined_efficiency_ratio) AS eff_stream_mean BY cluster_id container_id vendor
| eventstats latest(physical_used_gb) AS cluster_phys_hint latest(logical_used_gb) AS cluster_log_hint BY cluster_id vendor
| eval physical_used_gb=if((physical_used_gb<=0), cluster_phys_hint, physical_used_gb)
| eval logical_used_gb=if((logical_used_gb<=0), cluster_log_hint, logical_used_gb)
| join type=left max=0 cluster_id container_id vendor
    [| inputlookup hci_efficiency_baseline
     | eval cluster_id=toString(cluster_id)
     | eval container_id=toString(coalesce(container_id, volume_id, volumeId, ""))
     | eval vendor=lower(toString(vendor))
     | eval owner_team=toString(coalesce(owner_team, ownerTeam, ""))
     | eval target_min_combined_ratio=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(target_min_combined_ratio, targetMinCombinedRatio, "1.5")), 10)
     | eval target_max_drift_pct=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(target_max_drift_pct, targetMaxDriftPct, "15")), 10)
     | eval efficiency_baseline_csv=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(efficiency_baseline, efficiencyBaseline, "")), 10)
     | eval change_freeze_until=toString(coalesce(change_freeze_until, changeFreezeUntil, ""))
     | fields cluster_id container_id vendor owner_team target_min_combined_ratio target_max_drift_pct efficiency_baseline_csv change_freeze_until ]
| eval eff_lookup=if((isnotnull(efficiency_baseline_csv)) AND (efficiency_baseline_csv>0), efficiency_baseline_csv, null)
| eval efficiency_baseline=coalesce(eff_lookup, eff_stream_mean, combined_efficiency_ratio)
| eval efficiency_drift_pct=if((efficiency_baseline>0), round((((efficiency_baseline - combined_efficiency_ratio) / efficiency_baseline) * 100.0), 4), 0)
| eval physical_used_gb=if((physical_used_gb<=0) AND (logical_used_gb>0), logical_used_gb, physical_used_gb)
| eval dedupe_savings_lost_gb_24h=round(((efficiency_drift_pct / 100.0) * physical_used_gb), 4)
| sort 0 + cluster_id container_id vendor _time
| streamstats time_window=7d current=t window=8 global=f sum(dedupe_savings_lost_gb_24h) AS efficiency_capacity_at_risk_gb BY cluster_id container_id vendor
| eval warn_floor=round((target_max_drift_pct - 7.0), 4)
| eval ft=coalesce(strptime(change_freeze_until, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z"), strptime(change_freeze_until, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"), strptime(change_freeze_until, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"), strptime(change_freeze_until, "%Y-%m-%d"))
| eval freeze_active=if((len(toString(change_freeze_until))>4) AND (isnotnull(ft)) AND (now() < ft), 1, 0)
| eval below_min=if((isnotnull(target_min_combined_ratio)) AND (target_min_combined_ratio>0) AND (combined_efficiency_ratio < target_min_combined_ratio), 1, 0)
| eval sev0=case((((efficiency_drift_pct >= 25) AND (dedupe_savings_lost_gb_24h >= 1024))), "critical", ((efficiency_drift_pct >= target_max_drift_pct)), "high", ((efficiency_drift_pct >= warn_floor)), "warning", ((below_min=1)), "warning", 1=1, "info")
| eval severity=if((freeze_active=1), "info", sev0)
| dedup cluster_id container_id vendor sortby - _time
| table vendor cluster_id container_id combined_efficiency_ratio efficiency_baseline efficiency_drift_pct dedupe_ratio compression_ratio clone_ratio physical_used_gb dedupe_savings_lost_gb_24h efficiency_capacity_at_risk_gb severity owner_team change_freeze_until
```

How this search behaves: multisearch merges four vendor arms that each normalize camelCase and snake_case ratio fields, convert percentage-style ratios above forty-five into multipliers, default missing clone_ratio to one outside Nutanix, bin timestamps to one day so streamstats has multiple points per key, then compute combined_efficiency_ratio as the product. eventstats carries cluster-level byte hints when a given sourcetype only delivers ratios. The hci_efficiency_baseline join must use inputlookup inside the join, never the lookup command alone, so RBAC and reproducibility match UC-19.2.8 patterns. efficiency_drift_pct expresses how far combined multiplier fell below baseline as a positive percent when savings soften. dedupe_savings_lost_gb_24h scales drift percent against physical_used_gb for a tangible at-risk gigabyte proxy. The seven-day streamstats sum names efficiency_capacity_at_risk_gb. Severity ladder enforces critical only when drift and absolute gigabytes are both large, aligns high with target_max_drift_pct from governance, uses a seven-point warning band under that target, and marks informational rows when freeze windows are active.

Step 3 — Validate

Pick one Nutanix container in Prism storage efficiency and compare digits to the newest Splunk row after normalization, remembering clone_ratio only lifts Nutanix. Open vCenter vSAN cluster capacity summary and compare datastore logical versus physical consumption against logical_used_gb and physical_used_gb on the matching container_id token you mapped from PowerCLI. HX Connect efficiency tiles should align to hyperflex arms within one poll interval when units are multipliers. On Azure Stack HCI, compare Get-DedupVolume ScrubbingSchedule and SavedSpace with exported fields after verifying PowerShell uses the same volume GUID as container_id in Splunk. Run fieldsummary on each sourcetype after TA upgrades. Confirm hci_efficiency_baseline join hits by temporarily duplicating a row with a typo and watching owner_team blank, then restore CMDB-accurate keys. Negative test: set change_freeze_until two hours ahead and confirm severity becomes info while numeric drift columns stay nonzero. Confirm UC-19.2.2 pool free-space still moves independently, proving this UC is not a duplicate pool metric.

Step 4 — Operationalize

Dashboard layout: top row single value of worst efficiency_drift_pct by vendor, second row timechart of combined_efficiency_ratio by container_id with efficiency_baseline reference, third row trellis of dedupe_savings_lost_gb_24h, fourth row table mirroring alert outputs plus optional workload_class pulled from an extended lookup. Runbooks: critical fires trigger joint capacity and virtualization bridge with mandate to compare firmware change records, workload class shifts, and storage policy edits. high rows route through owner_team with requirement to attach vendor console screenshots. warning rows feed weekly capacity grooming with IT finance CC when efficiency_capacity_at_risk_gb exceeds internal capex tripwires. Document correlation boundaries versus UC-19.2.28 so engineers do not confuse EC rebuild noise with multiplier drift. Keep lookup edits in git with tickets. If Splunk ITSI is licensed, optional service analytics entities per cluster_id can track KPI math on combined_efficiency_ratio and efficiency_drift_pct with annual maintenance on threshold templates.

Step 5 — Troubleshooting

• **Case 1 Missing vendor arm rows after upgrade:** A Technical Add-on upgrade renamed JSON keys so coalesce lists return null ratios. Refresh fieldsummary dumps into git, extend coalesce aliases inside the affected multisearch stanza, and add FIELDALIAS in props before re-enabling alerts.

• **Case 2 streamstats baseline stuck equal to current ratio:** Fewer than thirty days of retained daily buckets yields an average that mirrors the latest point. Extend index retention, backfill synthetic history in lab, or populate efficiency_baseline in hci_efficiency_baseline for steady-state containers.

• **Case 3 HyperFlex cluster-only feeds collapse container diversity:** container_id resolves only to HF_CLUSTER so per-VM differentiation is impossible. Accept cluster scope for alerting or fork a child use case that ingests datastore-level REST when API permits finer granularity.

• **Case 4 Azure percent fields mis-identified as multipliers:** DedupSavedPercent arrives as fifteen meaning fifteen percent savings, not 0.15. Validate PowerShell export maps to the ASHCI arm’s dedupe_ratio branch and adjust the eval guard if your script already emits a multiplier.

• **Case 5 Join misses despite visible Splunk events:** vendor slug case mismatch between events and lookup breaks cluster_id container_id vendor join. Normalize ingestion eval vendor to lowercase and align hci_efficiency_baseline vendor column to the same slug list.

• **Case 6 Good math but absurd gigabyte at-risk numbers:** physical_used_gb was zero so the pipeline substituted logical_used_gb as a proxy. Inspect byte exports for that scale unit; some feeds publish tebibytes with labels saying gigabytes.

• **Case 7 Alert storms during bulk clone migrations:** Temporary clone_ratio spikes on Nutanix raise combined_efficiency_ratio and may collapse drift to zero or negative drift. Pair with change records, widen throttle windows, or filter devtest workload class via side lookup until migrations finish.

Extended notes for platform engineering: ratio alarms should never replace hardware failure monitors; use companion SMART or wear UCs where present. When NetApp or other NFS overlays front HCI exports, exclude them from this SPL to prevent double counting. Kubernetes CSI layers abstracting volumes may require container_id conventions tying to persistent volume claims documented externally. For stretched clusters, ensure cluster_id encodes site or maintain parallel searches per site; geo partitions skew streamstats if sites pause polls unevenly. Security reviews should validate that posted JSON does not leak restricted guest names beyond what policy allows. Training labs should script a deliberate ratio softening by introducing incompressible synthetic data, then rolling back. Capacity committees should read efficiency_capacity_at_risk_gb alongside UC-19.2.2 procurement charts monthly. Splunk search acceleration is not assumed; keep macros unaccelerated unless you test data model constraints. Documentation links belong in Confluence with explicit Splunk app versions. Collector host patching must be change-managed because missed polls create artificial drift slopes. UTF-8 BOMs in CSV lookups break strptime on change_freeze_until; save CSV as UTF-8 without BOM. Multitenancy may require separate hci_efficiency_baseline files per tenant but identical SPL. QA teams should snapshot multisearch arm counts weekly. Executives receive only redacted dashboards if guest identities appear in drilldowns. Storage QoS policies that cap IOPS can change compressibility indirectly; annotate such changes in ticketing. Re-ingest drills should verify sourcetype counts stay balanced across vendors to avoid silent omission. If Prism Element or HX Connect certificates rotate, pollers must trust the new chain promptly. Archive evidence exports with SHA-256 manifests when internal audit demands integrity proofs. Synthetic monitoring accounts need password rotation aligned with OAuth client secrets on REST pollers. Field limit breaches on small dev indexers may require INDEXED_EXTRACTIONS tuning. If a cluster migrates vendor during hardware refresh, retire old hci_efficiency_baseline rows to prevent phantom joins. Performance: multisearch runs four parallel subsearches; heavy estates should schedule off-peak if search heads CPU-bound. Mobile operations bridges should link deep URLs to vendor mobile consoles when available. cold bucket rebuild after indexer crash needs verify of streamstats continuity. governance workshops should train owners on the difference between this UC and UC-19.2.20 backup contexts to avoid organizational confusion. ROI storytelling should cite avoided emergency purchases when drift caught early with savings-at-risk figures.
grandmaExplanation: We watch how tightly the live storage cluster still packs real data compared with its usual shrink factor. If that slips, we show roughly how much spare space quietly vanished so the household budget for disks is not a surprise when ordinary alarms still look fine.
hardware: Applies to multi-vendor HCI nodes: VMware vSAN ReadyNode families across Dell PowerEdge, HPE ProLiant, and Lenovo ThinkSystem; Nutanix-branded NX appliances and Cisco UCS-based Nutanix nodes; Cisco HyperFlex HX-Series; Microsoft Azure Stack HCI validated systems (Dell AX, HPE, Lenovo, and others) running Storage Spaces Direct. Mixed flash and capacity tiers change compressibility; denote expected workload class in hci_efficiency_baseline so database footprints do not inherit file-share baselines.
